message:
test: expand coverage for screen scratch buffer reuse and blob-lease error types

screen.rs:
- Add `resize_reflow_reuses_scratch_buffers` test verifying that the
  rewrap_scratch_slots and rewrap_row_prefix_scratch Vec buffers retain
  their capacity across consecutive resize cycles rather than being
  reallocated, confirming the buffer-reuse optimization path works.

blob-leases/error.rs:
- Add `already_initialized_debug_output` test asserting Debug formatting
  for the AlreadyInitializedStorage error variant.
- Add `content_not_found_display_starts_with_content` test asserting the
  Display impl for ContentNotFound produces a human-readable message
  starting with "Content with id".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
